activities_projects.title: Compare Natural and Man-made Wonders
activities_projects.objective: Develop analytical skills by comparing two types of wonders
steps: List the wonders mentioned in the chapter
Classify them as natural or man-made
Compare their features such as formation, importance, and attraction
Write a short comparison paragraph
activities_projects.learning_outcome: Students understand differences between natural formations and human creations
activities_projects.evaluation: Accuracy of classification and quality of comparison (10 marks)

activities_projects.title: Valley of Flowers Research Activity
activities_projects.objective: Explore biodiversity and ecological importance of the Valley of Flowers
steps: Read the section about the Valley of Flowers
Identify the types of flowers and animals mentioned
Research one additional plant or animal found there
Write a short report explaining its ecological significance
activities_projects.learning_outcome: Students develop research skills and understand biodiversity
activities_projects.evaluation: Quality of research and clarity of explanation (10 marks)

activities_projects.title: Living Root Bridges Case Study
steps: Read the section on Living Root Bridges carefully
Explain how the bridges are formed using tree roots
Discuss why this method is environmentally friendly
Present your findings in a short paragraph
activities_projects.learning_outcome: Students learn about traditional knowledge and eco-friendly engineering
activities_projects.evaluation: Understanding of concept and explanation (10 marks)

activities_projects.title: Map Exploration Activity
activities_projects.objective: Connect geographical knowledge with natural wonders
steps: Locate Uttarakhand and mark the Valley of Flowers
Locate Meghalaya and mark the Living Root Bridges
Write two sentences about each location’s geographical features
Discuss how geography influences these wonders
activities_projects.learning_outcome: Students understand the role of geography in shaping natural phenomena
activities_projects.evaluation: Correct map work and explanation (10 marks)

activities_projects.title: Vocabulary and Context Usage
steps: Identify difficult words like 'mystifying', 'spectacle', and 'exotic'
Write their meanings and synonyms
Create sentences using these words
Share your sentences with classmates
activities_projects.learning_outcome: Students enhance vocabulary and language usage
activities_projects.evaluation: Correct meaning and sentence construction (10 marks)

activities_projects.title: Discussion – Importance of Natural Wonders
activities_projects.objective: Encourage critical thinking about environmental conservation
steps: Discuss in pairs why natural wonders should be protected
Identify threats such as pollution or tourism impact
Suggest possible conservation measures
Share ideas with the class
activities_projects.evaluation: Quality of ideas and participation (10 marks)

activities_projects.title: Creative Description Writing
steps: Choose one natural wonder mentioned in the chapter
Imagine you are visiting the place
Describe the sights, sounds, and feelings you experience
Write a descriptive paragraph
activities_projects.learning_outcome: Students improve creative and descriptive writing abilities

activities_projects.title: Poster Campaign – Save Natural Wonders
steps: Select a natural wonder discussed in the chapter
Create a poster highlighting its beauty and importance
Add slogans encouraging conservation
Display your poster in class
activities_projects.learning_outcome: Students learn to communicate environmental messages creatively
activities_projects.evaluation: Creativity, message clarity, and presentation (10 marks)

activities_projects.title: Short Presentation on a Natural Wonder
activities_projects.objective: Improve public speaking and presentation skills
steps: Choose a natural wonder from India or the world
Collect key facts such as location, history, and features
Prepare a short oral presentation
Present it before the class
activities_projects.learning_outcome: Students develop confidence and research skills
activities_projects.evaluation: Clarity of presentation and accuracy of information (10 marks)

activities_projects.title: Reflection Writing – Why Wonders Inspire Us
activities_projects.objective: Encourage personal reflection on natural beauty
steps: Think about a natural wonder that amazes you
Explain why it inspires or fascinates you
Write a short reflective paragraph
Share your reflection with the class
activities_projects.learning_outcome: Students connect learning with personal experiences
activities_projects.evaluation: Depth of reflection and clarity of writing (10 marks)
